heading: Gateway Settings
subtitle: Hot-reloadable gateway behavior parameters. Changes apply within one config poll (~5s), no restart needed for hot fields.

trace.title: Trace Capture
trace.description: LLM trace-payload capture (ADR-0039). Stores prompt/completion plaintext + raw bodies in the trace_payloads ledger for session→request→message→raw debugging.

captureEnabled.label: Enable Capture
captureEnabled.help: Toggle full message + raw body capture. Hot-applied per request.

maxBodyKB.label: Max Body (KB)
maxBodyKB.help: Per-request captured body cap (0 = uncapped). Hot-applied.

retentionDays.label: Retention (days)
retentionDays.help: Trace-payload retention window (≤0 = default 7). Read by the admin TTL job.

ingress.title: Ingress Protocols
ingress.description: Control which client ingress protocols the gateway accepts (ADR-0045/0048). Zero value = all enabled; checking disable returns 404 for that endpoint.

anthropicDisabled.label: Disable Anthropic Ingress
anthropicDisabled.help: When checked, /v1/messages returns 404 — Claude Code and other Anthropic clients cannot connect. Hot-applied per request.
